Chen Ping'an

On this page

Chen Ping'an ​

Chen Ping'an

TitlesYoung Master
FactionLuopo Mountain
RealmTo be verified
WeaponTo be verified
陈平安Chén Píng'ānChen Ping'an

Overview ​

Chen Ping'an is the protagonist of Jian Lai (Sword, Come!). A young man from Lizhu Blessed Land who embarks on a journey of cultivation and self-discovery.
